task: Polish 16: NWT embedding — merge nwt/embed-v1 into main
summary: Polish 16: NWT embedding — merge nwt/embed-v1 into main
reason: Chairman: 'OK 批准改动, 合并吧, 完成之后构建应用, 然后自己跑个端对端测试, 简单中等困难, 并且摸清边界情况, 并且及时记录bug, 回头统一修理'. Merged 6 NWT embedding commits (adad6fa..b819a2d on nwt/embed-v1) into main as 2bcf032. Resolved 5 conflicts: i18n keys (combined Polish 14-prime 64 keys + 12 workdir keys), generate_handler! registration (search_log + get_workdir/set_workdir), NWT_INSTRUCTION duplicate (embed-v1 had two copies), raw string `"` escape fix (switched r"..." to r#"..."#), #[cfg(test)] lost during dedup, every_prompt_has_nwt_section duplicate test. Verification: pnpm typecheck clean, cargo check --workspace clean, cargo test --workspace --lib all pass. NWT is now first-class: WorkdirSetup on first launch → per-workflow .nwt/ init → all 6 roles get NWT_INSTRUCTION in system prompt → agents auto-call nwt_log on milestones.
